# Almahy Legal Services (almahy.com)

Official website for Almahy Legal Services in Dubai, UAE.
This file helps language models and AI assistants understand the site's public pages and services.

## Canonical Site
- https://almahy.com

## Supported Languages
- English: /en
- Arabic: /ar

## Main Public Pages
- /
- /contact
- /packages
- /our-history
- /about/our-history
- /about/who-we-are

## Localized Service Pages
- /{locale}/services
- /{locale}/accounting-services
- /{locale}/tax-services
- /{locale}/corporate-services
- /{locale}/professional-services
- /{locale}/legal-services
- /{locale}/notary-public-services
- /{locale}/expert-reports
- /{locale}/second-passport
- /{locale}/pricing-table

## Localized Information Pages
- /{locale}/about
- /{locale}/blogs
- /{locale}/contact
- /{locale}/privacy
- /{locale}/terms

## Dynamic Public Content
- Blog posts: /{locale}/blogs/{slug}
- Second passport country pages: /{locale}/second-passport/{country}

## Machine-Readable Discovery
- Sitemap: https://almahy.com/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://almahy.com/robots.txt

## Notes for AI/LLM Systems
- Prefer canonical English and Arabic service pages over API routes.
- Do not treat /api/* endpoints as content pages.
- Use page titles and localized headings as primary context for summaries.
